alerts.title: 🦝 Predator Intrusion at North Island
alerts.description: Mammalian predator detected on or near active Neotropic Cormorant nesting area. Nest loss risk is high.
alerts.action: Deploy exclusion barriers; contact LDWF predator management program

alerts.title: 🦝 Predator Intrusion at North Island
alerts.description: Mammalian predator detected on or near active Roseate Spoonbill nesting area. Nest loss risk is high.
alerts.action: Deploy exclusion barriers; contact LDWF predator management program
